## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail. What issue does this fix? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## Merge Checklist:
- [ ] I have run `make lint` and `make format` (Ruff) locally and they pass.
- [ ] My code passes the existing test suite (`make test`).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my incoming fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have updated the Swagger API annotations (`@extend_schema`) if I changed endpoints.
